mapper.select:
SELECT p.seq, p.member_name AS memberName, p.phone_number AS phoneNumber, p.start_date AS startDate, p.end_date AS endDate, p.reason, p.status, p.admin_message AS adminMessage, p.created_date AS createdDate, c.name AS desiredClassName, ts.name AS desiredTimeSlotName, ts.start_time AS desiredStartTime, ts.end_time AS desiredEndTime FROM complex_postponement_requests p LEFT JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = p.desired_class_seq LEFT JOIN class_time_slots ts ON ts.seq = c.time_slot_seq
ORDER BY p.created_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.seq, p.member_name AS memberName, p.phone_number AS phoneNumber, p.start_date AS startDate, p.end_date AS endDate, p.reason, p.status, p.admin_message AS adminMessage, p.created_date AS createdDate, c.name AS desiredClassName, ts.name AS desiredTimeSlotName, ts.start_time AS desiredStartTime, ts.end_time AS desiredEndTime FROM complex_postponement_requests p LEFT JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = p.desired_class_seq LEFT JOIN class_time_slots ts ON ts.seq = c.time_slot_seq WHERE p.member_seq = #{memberSeq} ORDER BY p.created_date DESC
